scope: H5 VIP modal copy and payment redirect path

modal.title: Upgrade to VIP
modal.subtitle: Unlock deeper replies and priority care for this chat.
body: Get a warmer, more complete conversation experience.
Your payment is processed securely by Stripe.
You can close this window and continue chatting anytime.
modal.age_gate_note: VIP purchase is available only after age verification.
modal.blocked_minor_message: VIP purchase is not available for this account.
modal.error_message: Payment could not be started. Please try again later.

payment_redirect.client_action: Open checkout_url in the current H5 webview or browser tab.

post_success_copy.title: Payment complete
post_success_copy.body: Your VIP upgrade is being activated. You can return to chat now.

post_cancel_copy.title: Payment canceled
post_cancel_copy.body: No charge was made. You can try again whenever you are ready.

product_acceptance: VIP modal has approved title, body, benefit bullets, primary CTA, secondary CTA, and trust note.
CTA calls POST /api/v1/orders with product_id=vip, amount=499, currency=USD.
H5 opens the returned checkout_url without constructing Stripe URLs itself.
Success and cancel redirects match STRIPE_SUCCESS_URL and STRIPE_CANCEL_URL.
Age-unverified and suspected-minor accounts do not enter checkout.
Payment failure keeps the user in chat and shows a retryable error message.
